name: 2pk Bridget Wood & Iron Patio Dining Chair Gray: Acacia Slatted, Weather-Resistant - Christopher Knight Home
description: Dine with your friends and family under the enchanting night sky with the help of these Christopher Knight Home Bridget Wood and Iron Dining Chairs (Set of 2). This set will instantly upgrade your backyard or patio space without overhauling your existing furniture. With clean, minimalistic lines and modern industrial style, this set of chairs is perfect for dinner parties and afternoon luncheons. Featuring vertically slatted seating and matching backrests made from gorgeous acacia wood, these Christopher Knight Home Bridget Wood and Iron Dining Chairs are made for both durability and impressive luxury, making them ideal for any backyard space.
